ksa_text: Knowledge of data validation techniques and methods for embedding quality checks into pipeline execution, including schema validation, data contract enforcement, freshness checks, volume anomaly detection, referential integrity verification, and appropriate failure handling and alerting.

STRM composite score is moderate-to-strong (0.3869); note that framework scores routinely underweight technical execution KSAs for this role, so text-based signal carries primary weight. Seniority is appropriate for IC-to-senior-IC: the KSA describes technical practice, not organizational strategy.
